entry.title: New: Reso 25-46 GREAT-11(3) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
RESOLUTION 25-46, SETTLEMENT AUTHORIZATION: CONSERVATION COUNCIL FOR HAWAIʻI AND AMERICAN BIRD CONSERVANCY V. HAWAIIAN ELECTRIC COMPANY, INC. AND MAUI ELECTRIC COMPANY, LTD. AND COUNTY OF MAUI; CASE 1:24-CV-00494-MWJS-WRP

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
